hero.headline: Open your US business in 14 days. In your language. With humans.
hero.sub: We're consultincusa. We help newcomer founders form US LLCs, get EINs, open Mercury accounts, and stay compliant — in English, Português, Español, हिंदी, and 中文.
hero.trust: ✓ 14-day guarantee   ✓ Form 5472 included   ✓ Mercury rescue path   ✓ WhatsApp human support

form.title: Get the free guide + WhatsApp anchor
form.opt_in: Yes, send me WhatsApp updates from my anchor.
form.success_body: Your anchor will reach out shortly. Watch for a message from a US number — that's us.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email hello@consultincusa.com.

validation.whatsapp_invalid: Enter your WhatsApp with country code, e.g. +55 11 99999 9999.
validation.opt_in_required: We need your consent to send WhatsApp messages.

footer.disclaimer: We are not lawyers or accountants. Information here is educational, not legal or tax advice.
